courseName: Aircraft Weight Balance and Aircraft Handling
deptName: ช่างอากาศยาน
learningOutcomes:
Be able to know, understand, explain and apply knowledge for Aircraft Handling and
Storage, Aircraft jacking, Refueling/defueling procedures, De-icing/anti-icing procedures,
Electrical, hydraulic, pneumatic ground supplies, Aircraft Weight and Balance and Have a good
attitude to work neatly, be patience with work, a habit of working carefully and safety.
objectives:
1. Be able to know and understand the Aircraft Handling and Storage, Aircraft jacking,
Refueling/defueling procedures, De-icing/anti-icing procedures, Electrical, hydraulic and
pneumatic ground supplies and Aircraft Weight and Balance
2. Be able to explain the Aircraft Handling and Storage, Aircraft jacking, Refueling/defueling
procedures, De-icing/anti-icing procedures, Electrical, hydraulic and pneumatic ground supplies and
Aircraft Weight and Balance.
3. Have a good attitude to work neatly, be patience with work, a habit of working
carefully and safety
4. Be able to apply knowledge for Aircraft Handling and Storage, Aircraft jacking,
Refueling/defueling procedures, De-icing/anti-icing procedures, Electrical, hydraulic and
pneumatic ground supplies and Aircraft Weight and Balance.
competencies:
1. Describe and codify knowledge about the Aircraft Handling and Storage, Aircraft
jacking, Refueling/defueling procedures, De-icing/anti-icing procedures, Electrical, hydraulic
and pneumatic ground supplies and Aircraft Weight and Balance.
2. Apply knowledge the Aircraft Handling and Storage, Aircraft jacking,
Refueling/defueling procedures, De-icing/anti-icing procedures, Electrical, hydraulic and
pneumatic ground supplies and Aircraft Weight and Balance.
3. Apply knowledge about the Aircraft Handling and Storage, Aircraft jacking,
Refueling/defueling procedures, De-icing/anti-icing procedures, Electrical, hydraulic and
pneumatic ground supplies and Aircraft Weight and Balance in their higher education.
description:
To study and practice about Aircraft Handling and Storage should learn Aircraft taxiing
towing and associated safety precautions, Aircraft jacking, chocking, securing and associated
safety precautions, Aircraft storage methods, Refueling/ defueling procedures, De-icing/ anti-
icing procedures, Electrical, hydraulic and pneumatic ground supplies, Effects of environmental
conditions on aircraft handling operation and Aircraft Weight and Balance to know Centre of
Gravity/Balance limits calculation including Preparation of aircraft weighing.
